resources.string: An Xposed Framework module that bypasses Android\'s user/profile creation limits\nCaution: Disabling or uninstalling the module with a Device Owner present will automatically delete the Private Space after rebooting!!!
Any changes you make will not be saved
Master switch to enable/disable all module functions.
Enable this to bypass user creation restrictions (Android 14+)
Enable this to bypass profile limits (Android 11–13)
Enable this to bypass managed profile limits (Android 6–10)
Enable this to bypass user limit checks (Android 7–13)
Enable this to bypass user limit checks (Android 4.2–6)
Allow the app to be forcibly set as the Device Owner without deleting users or accounts.
Allow the app to be forcibly set as the Profile Owner without deleting users or accounts.
Note: Please restart your device after modifying these options to apply the changes.
The no_add_user is a user restriction on Android that prevents the user creation.
The no_add_managed_profile is a user restriction on Android that prevents the creation of work profiles.
The no_add_private_profile is a user restriction on Android that prevents the creation of private space.
The no_add_clone_profile is a user restriction on Android that prevents the creation of cloned app profiles (app cloning/dual apps).
